title: GDS and Raise go live this Friday
content_html:
GDS and Raise go live on Cryptool this Friday.

What you will find on the platform:

  • A detailed view of project data points, vesting schedules and upcoming events
  • The Raise module ready to handle real fundraising pools end to end
  • The first Cryptool marketing campaign kicking off in parallel to onboard new users

This release is one of the most significant milestones for the platform so far. Get your account ready.
author: Cryptool
